hero.title_pre: You scaled fast. Now let's build the
hero.description: We bring structure to fast-growing companies — through hands-on agile consulting, leadership coaching, and team training that sticks.

about.description: Since 2020, we've embedded into fast-moving companies and helped their leaders turn chaos into operating systems — using agile frameworks that fit the real world, not just the textbook.

benefits.title: Operational clarity — from week one
benefits.desc: Teams that leave training with defined processes and a clear work rhythm.

benefits.title: Management systems your team will actually use
benefits.desc: Agile rituals adapted to the business context — without unnecessary theory.

benefits.title: Leaders who drive results — not just manage people
benefits.desc: Practical leadership development for those who manage people and results.

about.methodology_desc: Scrum, Kanban, OKRs, Design Thinking and SAFe — adapted to the real business context.

services.title: Three ways we work with you — pick what fits where you are right now
services.description: Whether you need consulting, coaching, or hands-on training — we meet you where you are.

items.title: Organizational

items: Identification of bottlenecks and critical points

items.subtitle: & Group

methodology.title_pre: How we turn your operations around —
methodology.description: We follow a structured process that ensures consistency, continuous learning and real value delivery.

steps.title: Operations audit
steps.desc: We audit your current people, processes, and priorities — surfacing the exact bottlenecks holding your team back.

steps.title: Custom transformation roadmap
steps.desc: We design a roadmap tailored to your reality — with clear milestones, ownership, and timelines your team can follow.

steps.title: Side-by-side implementation
steps.desc: We work directly alongside your team — not just advise from the sidelines — to build capability that lasts.

steps.title: Measure, learn, and keep improving
steps.desc: We track outcomes with clear indicators, run retrospectives, and keep adjusting until results stick.

methodology.methodology_desc: we combine Scrum, Kanban, OKRs, Design Thinking and SAFe with absolute focus on practical implementation.
methodology.disclaimer: Average results observed in agile transformation projects conducted by Tribo Ágil.
